BIRDEATER.name: Ammo
BIRDEATER.“: This modern refitting of the stock Devitt model features an updated turret sporting a twin-barreled anti-air cannon. While it may resemble older models, the Birdeater Mk. I is an effective mobile anti-air platform. Its innards have been shifted around to accommodate specialized shells.
BIRDEATER.update_1.64: Added to the game. Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate. General Change(s) Added a hint for toggling Anti-Aircraft mode when mounted on relevant weapons.

BOLAS.name: Ammo
BOLAS.“: A late entry into the Leary arsenal, the AA-70 Bolas was a direct response to a sudden uptick in Colonial aerial aggression. This emplaced cannon excels equally at both slowing and bringing down enemy aircraft.
BOLAS.small_assembly_station_[battery_line]: 30 x Processed Construction Materials 10 x Assembly Materials I 20 x Assembly Materials IV 2MW of Power
BOLAS.update_1.64: Emplaced AA Gun accuracy increased by 25%. Removed the right-side crank from the Emplaced AA Guns. Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate. General Change(s) Added a hint for toggling Anti-Aircraft mode when mounted on relevant weapons.

BRIGAND.name: Ammo
BRIGAND.“: The first of Colm Gallagher’s mid-sized tanks, the Brigand is a true brute on the battlefield. Not quite as sturdy as its younger siblings, the Brigand compensates with higher mobility, which, when paired with a mounted machine gun and 30mm repeater cannon, is a deadly force in any armour division. Seeing his hometown sundered at the hands of the Swords in a border skirmish before the onset of the Boreal Wars, Gallagher grew fixated on engineering a versatile yet sturdy tank. The Brigand was the result of his fixation.
BRIGAND.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
BRIGAND.update_1.59:_infantry_update: Added to the game. Wiki Note: Now a base vehicle for the Gallagher Outlaw Mk. II, Gallagher Highwayman Mk. III and Gallagher Thornfall Mk. VI (the Outlaw was formerly the base chassis for the tank line).

CHIEFTAIN.name: Ammo
CHIEFTAIN.“: The Chieftain assault tank is fitted with asymmetrical armaments, including a 250mm mortar cannon and a twin-barrelled 12.7mm turret.
CHIEFTAIN.small_assembly_station_[tank_factory]: 1 x Silverhand - Mk. IV 5 x Processed Construction Materials 10 x Assembly Materials I 8 x Assembly Materials IV 2MW of Power
CHIEFTAIN.update_1.64: Reverse speed reduced by ~20%. Acceleration decreased. Armour penetration chance decreased from 27 to 25%. Armour health increased from 13300 to 15000. Dev Note: Gaining armour at the expense of manoeuvrability, the Silverhand - Mk. IV has been adjusted to be more comparable with the 86-Ka "Bardiche" as a heavily armoured, main-line tank.
CHIEFTAIN.update_1.59:_infantry_update: Track subsystem disable chance has been reduced slightly.
CHIEFTAIN.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
CHIEFTAIN.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 480 to 320 Processed Construction Materials. 30 to 20 Assembly Materials I. 24 to 16 Assembly Materials IV.
CHIEFTAIN.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Silverhand Chieftain - Mk. VI: 6 inventory slots > 250mm x5 ammo slot, 12.7mm x30 ammo slot.

COLLINS.name: Ammo
COLLINS.“: The Collins Cannon is a mobile Anti-Tank field gun firing 68mm armour-piercing rounds.
COLLINS.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
COLLINS.update_1.59:_infantry_update: General Change(s) Hidden Field Weapons are briefly revealed if they fire their weapon*. Players enclosed in a vehicle will not see them be revealed.
COLLINS.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 60 to 40 Processed Construction Materials.
COLLINS.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Collins Cannon 68mm: 1 inventory slot > 68mm x35 ammo slot.

DEVIT IRONHIDE.name: Ammo
DEVIT IRONHIDE.“: The Ironhide Light Tank is similar to the Mk. III but reinforced with plates of heavy steel at the expense of speed and maneuverability.
DEVIT IRONHIDE.small_assembly_station_[tank_factory]: 1 x Devitt Mk. III 8 x Processed Construction Materials 20 x Assembly Materials II 5 x Assembly Materials III 2MW of Power
DEVIT IRONHIDE.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
DEVIT IRONHIDE.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 385 to 255 Processed Construction Materials. 60 to 40 Assembly Materials II. 15 to 10 Assembly Materials III.
DEVIT IRONHIDE.update_1.54_naval_warfare: Can now be shipped in Flatbeds and Landing Ships.
DEVIT IRONHIDE.update_1.53: Disable threshold reduced from 30% to 20%. Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Devitt Ironhide Mk. IV: 1 inventory slot > 40mm x35 ammo slot.

EAT.name: Ammo
EAT.“: A defensive emplacement with a 68mm Anti-tank cannon. This rudimentary weapon was once built to fit onto the hull of large naval vessels, but was eventually phased out and repurposed.
EAT.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
EAT.update_1.59:_infantry_update: General Change(s) Hidden Emplacements are briefly revealed if they fire their weapon*. Players enclosed in a vehicle will not see them be revealed.
EAT.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Leary Shellbore 68mm: 1 inventory slot > 68mm x40 ammo slot.

FALCONER.name: Ammo
FALCONER.“: A heavy mobile mortar platform fitted with a thick frontal shield for assaulting fortified locations.
FALCONER.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
FALCONER.update_1.59:_infantry_update: General Change(s) Hidden Field Weapons are briefly revealed if they fire their weapon*. Players enclosed in a vehicle will not see them be revealed.
FALCONER.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 105 to 70 Processed Construction Materials.
FALCONER.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Balfour Falconer 250mm: 6 inventory slots > 250mm x6 ammo slot.

FIREBRAND.name: Ammo
FIREBRAND.“: In response to the Legion embarking on aggressive northern offensives, the Firebrand is designed to conflagrate and eradicate their garrisons with ease. Built using the aggressive frame of the Widow, the Firebrand is a pure force of nature when paired with a secondary armoured escort.
FIREBRAND.small_assembly_station_[tank_factory]: 1 x Noble Widow MK. XIV 10 x Processed Construction Materials 10 x Assembly Materials II 15 x Assembly Materials III 2MW of Power
FIREBRAND.update_1.64: Chassis Change: Penetration chance increased from 17 to 22%. Off-road and reverse speed penalty removed. Fuel consumption reduced by 30%.
FIREBRAND.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
FIREBRAND.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 510 to 340 Processed Construction Materials. 30 to 20 Assembly Materials II. 45 to 30 Assembly Materials III.
FIREBRAND.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Noble Firebrand Mk. XVII: 10 inventory slots > Flame Ammo x10 ammo slot.

FUELRUNNER.name: Fuelrunner
FUELRUNNER.“: The Fuelrunner is a heavy Dunne rig designed to transport and distribute large quantities of Fuel.
FUELRUNNER.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
FUELRUNNER.update_1.60: Reduced 25 inventory slots to 1 Multi Item Slot that can hold 35 of any liquid. General Change(s) Added Multi Item Slots. This slot can hold a stack of pre-defined items that can be viewed in the slot's tooltip.
FUELRUNNER.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
FUELRUNNER.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 225 to 150 Construction Materials.
FUELRUNNER.update_1.50_inferno: Fuel capacity reduced. (Fuel items no longer stacked. Inventory increased from 2 to 25.) Wiki Note: Changed from 200 items (2 x100) > 25 items (25 x1).

HIGHWAYMAN.name: Ammo
HIGHWAYMAN.“: Colm Gallagher’s engineers designed a variation of the Outlaw that features an independently rotating MG turret sitting atop the main armament of twin anti-tank cannons. What it lacks in raw firepower compared to its older sibling, the Highwayman more than makes up for it with versatility.
HIGHWAYMAN.small_assembly_station_[tank_factory]: 1 x Gallagher Brigand Mk. I 5 x Processed Construction Materials 10 x Assembly Materials II 5 x Assembly Materials III 2MW of Power
HIGHWAYMAN.update_1.64: 14.5mm main cannons: Max Range increased from 35 to 40m. Max reachability increased from 40 to 45m.
HIGHWAYMAN.update_1.63_airborne: General Change(s) 20mm Anti-Tank Rifle ammo has been renamed to 14.5mm. Wiki Note: Equipment using this ammo has been changed accordingly.
HIGHWAYMAN.update_1.59:_infantry_update: 12.7mm Turret Maximum possible accuracy reduced slightly. Turret rotation speed increased by ~43%. 20mm Turret no longer has a low velocity modifier. General Change(s) Base Chassis changed from: Gallagher Outlaw Mk. II > Gallagher Brigand Mk. I.
HIGHWAYMAN.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
HIGHWAYMAN.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 465 to 310 Processed Construction Materials. 30 to 20 Assembly Materials II. 15 to 10 Assembly Materials III.
HIGHWAYMAN.update_1.55: Health increased from 2700 to 2950. Armour Health increased by 10%. Wiki Note: Increased from 10000 to 11000. Tier upgrade cost decreased from 480 to 465 Processed Construction Materials.
HIGHWAYMAN.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Gallagher Highwayman Mk. III: 2 inventory slots > 12.7mm x30 ammo slot, 20mm x40 ammo slot, 1 inventory slot.

JUGGERNAUT.name: Ammo
JUGGERNAUT.“: The Juggernaut is a heavily armoured Flood variant fitted with a heavy flamethrower turret that fires an advanced adhesive propellant. Its shovel-like treads may hinder top speeds, but this beast is quite capable in extreme weather conditions.
JUGGERNAUT.large_assembly_station_[heavy_tank_assem: 40 x Steel Construction Materials 65 x Assembly Materials III 30 x Assembly Materials IV 45 x Assembly Materials V 8MW of Power
JUGGERNAUT.update_1.64: Heavy Combat Vehicles and certain Large Trains can now be Anchored similar to Large Ships, preventing interaction with the vehicle until it is Unanchored.
JUGGERNAUT.update_1.59:_infantry_update: Cost reduced from 55 to 40 Steel Construction Materials.
JUGGERNAUT.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
JUGGERNAUT.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Flood Juggernaught Mk. VII: 20 inventory slots > Flame Ammo x10 ammo slot, 75mm x15 ammo slot.
JUGGERNAUT.update_1.51: Re-added to the game. Wiki Note: Its 12.7mm hull-mounted Machine Gun has been replaced with a Heavy Flamethrower.
JUGGERNAUT.update_0.40: All Battle Tanks are removed from the game.

KING GALLANT.name: Ammo
KING GALLANT.“: A heavily armoured variant of the King Spire, the Gallant Mk. II boasts a weighty 30mm cannon at the cost of top speed.
KING GALLANT.small_assembly_station_[field_station]: 1 x King Spire Mk. I 5 x Processed Construction Materials 5 x Assembly Materials III 2MW of Power
KING GALLANT.update_1.64: Armour health increased from 7500 to 8500. Track disable chance reduced from 30 to 20%. General Change(s) Scout Tank repair cost reduced from 135 to 100.
KING GALLANT.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
KING GALLANT.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 225 to 150 Processed Construction Materials. 15 to 10 Assembly Materials I.
KING GALLANT.update_1.54_naval_warfare: Can now be shipped in Flatbeds and Landing Ships.
KING GALLANT.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. King Gallant MK-II: 1 inventory slot > 30mm x40 ammo slot.
KING GALLANT.update_1.50_inferno: Scout Tanks size reduced so they are not as big as the Light Tanks after they were resized in Update 49.

KING SPIRE.name: Ammo
KING SPIRE.“: This small tank has been recently recommissioned to the Warden arsenal. It boasts high maneuverability and an antenna that allows for long-range communications during high-stakes recon operations.
KING SPIRE.update_1.64: Armour health increased from 6000 to 8000. Track disable chance increased from 20 to 25%. Stability cost per shot reduced. Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate. General Change(s) Scout Tank repair cost reduced from 135 to 100.
KING SPIRE.update_1.59:_infantry_update: Turret turning speed has been increased by 20%.
KING SPIRE.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
KING SPIRE.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 210 to 140 Processed Construction Materials.
KING SPIRE.update_1.54_naval_warfare: Can now be shipped in Flatbeds and Landing Ships.
KING SPIRE.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. King Spire MK-I: 2 inventory slots > 12.7mm x30 ammo slot, 1 inventory slot.
KING SPIRE.update_1.50_inferno: Scout Tanks size reduced so they are not as big as the Light Tanks after they were resized in Update 0.49.
KING SPIRE.update_0.48: Stability when firing has been improved.
KING SPIRE.update_0.44: Commander position now serve double duty as gunner.

KIVELA.name: Kivela
KIVELA.“: A Warden motorcycle used in patrols and fitted with a sidecar. The Kivela Power Wheel can also gain a momentary speed boost by burning additional fuel.
KIVELA.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
KIVELA.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
KIVELA.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 125 to 80 Construction Materials.

LANDRUNNER.name: Landrunner
LANDRUNNER.“: This standard Truck is fitted with rugged off-road treads, allowing for more efficient movement on rough terrain and conditions at the expense of maximum speed.
LANDRUNNER.small_assembly_station: 1 x Dunne Transport 10 x Construction Materials 2MW of Power
LANDRUNNER.update_1.59:_infantry_update: Mechanic Change(s) Vehicles that are over-encumbered are unable to tow trailers.
LANDRUNNER.update_1.57: General Change(s) Trailers of Tractors now gain heat if the Tractor's engine is on. Wiki Note: Allows trailers to be defrosted while towing, and prevents them from freezing.
LANDRUNNER.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 225 to 150 Construction Materials.

LEATHERBACK.name: Leatherback
LEATHERBACK.“: A heavy, reinforced Dunne transport. Fitted with a heavier frame, the Leatherback is capable of enduring more punishment at the cost of initial acceleration.
LEATHERBACK.small_assembly_station: 1 x Dunne Transport 10 x Construction Materials 2MW of Power
LEATHERBACK.update_1.59:_infantry_update: Health increased from 1000 to 1250 Mechanic Change(s) Vehicles that are over-encumbered are unable to tow trailers.
LEATHERBACK.update_1.57: General Change(s) Trailers of Tractors now gain heat if the Tractor's engine is on. Wiki Note: Allows trailers to be defrosted while towing, and prevents them from freezing.
LEATHERBACK.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 225 to 150 Construction Materials.

LOADLUGGER.name: Loadlugger
LOADLUGGER.“: This standard Truck is fitted with a resource hopper in place of the standard cargo hold. This allows for a much greater capacity for resources at the expense of space for cargo.
LOADLUGGER.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
LOADLUGGER.update_1.59:_infantry_update: Top speed reduced and handling adjusted to match to the Dunne Transport]] and R-1 Hauler.
LOADLUGGER.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 225 to 150 Construction Materials.

LORDSCAR.name: Ammo
LORDSCAR.“: A cut down variation of the Silverhand Assault Tank that sacrifices armour and protection in favour of a high-powered 94.5mm cannon. This open-top weapon platform is uniquely designed to intercept enemy armour before they’re given time to retaliate. Its moniker is a tribute to the maiming of the great king the Silverhand is named for; while his title was stripped, and his pride damaged, his rage was never quelled.
LORDSCAR.small_assembly_station_[weapons_platform: 1 x Silverhand - Mk. IV 15 x Steel Construction Materials 25 x Assembly Materials II 25 x Assembly Materials III 2MW of Power
LORDSCAR.update_1.64: Static rotation rate increased by ~33%. Acceleration decreased slightly. Armour penetration chance decreased from 30 to 28%. Logi Change(s) Steel Construction Materials cost decreased from 40 to 15.
LORDSCAR.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
LORDSCAR.update_1.57: Commander has been restricted from holding any secondary item to Binoculars only due to egregious clipping with secondary weapons. General Change(s) Added the ability for certain passenger seats to equip only Binoculars. Certain seats have been restricted from holding any secondary item to Binoculars only due to egregious clipping with secondary weapons.
LORDSCAR.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 130 to 86 Steel Construction Materials. 45 to 30 Assembly Materials II. 75 to 50 Assembly Materials III.
LORDSCAR.update_1.53: Cost increased from 35 to 40 Steel Construction Materials. Added a Low-Velocity modifier of 31%. The Gunner vision has been extended by 4m to be inline with other open-top combat vehicles. Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Silverhand Lordscar Mk. X 6: inventory slots > 94.5mm x6 ammo slot.

LOSCANN.name: Loscann
LOSCANN.“: This amphibious Light Utility Vehicle has been heavily modified to cross rivers and lakes with ease. Venturing out into the open sea is ill-advised, however.
LOSCANN.small_assembly_station_[motor_pool]: 1 x Drummond 100a 3 x Construction Materials 5 x Assembly Materials II 2MW of Power
LOSCANN.update_1.63_airborne: General Change(s) Improved the performance of Scout Vehicles whilst encumbered.
LOSCANN.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
LOSCANN.update_1.57: Passengers have been restricted from holding any secondary item to Binoculars only due to egregious clipping with secondary weapons. General Change(s) Added the ability for certain passenger seats to equip only Binoculars. Certain seats have been restricted from holding any secondary item to Binoculars only due to egregious clipping with secondary weapons.
LOSCANN.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 9 to 6 Construction Materials. 30 to 20 Processed Construction Materials. 15 to 10 Assembly Materials II.

MULLOY.name: Mulloy
MULLOY.“: The Mulloy Landing Personnel Carrier is an armoured amphibious vehicle designed for carrying troops across large bodies of water to aid in coordinated beach landings and flanking assaults.
MULLOY.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
MULLOY.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
MULLOY.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 60 to 40 Processed Construction Materials.

NISKA GUN MOTOR.name: Niska Mk. III Gun Motor Carriage

NISKA SKYCALLER.name: Ammo
NISKA SKYCALLER.“: A first of its kind, the Skycaller is a variation of the Niska Motor Carriage with a Rycker designed rocket battery fitted in the rear bed. This unique armoured vehicle quickly fires rockets over long distances with ease, and can be rearmed and relocated at the drop of a hat. The Skycaller is the deadly result of combined Nevish and Caoivish engineering.
NISKA SKYCALLER.small_assembly_station_[battery_line]: 1 x Niska Mk. I Gun Motor Carriage 10 x Processed Construction Materials 10 x Assembly Materials I 8 x Assembly Materials III 2MW of Power
NISKA SKYCALLER.update_1.62: General Change(s) Improved the collisions on all Half-Tracks, especially around the passenger area.
NISKA SKYCALLER.update_1.61: Min range increased to 275m. Max range increased from 350m. Wiki Note: Previously had a range of 200m - 275m. The accuracy of each platform has been adjusted accordingly. Wiki Note: Dispersion radius at min/max range increased from 25m/37.5m to 37.5m/60m.
NISKA SKYCALLER.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
NISKA SKYCALLER.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 195 to 130 Processed Construction Materials. 30 to 20 Assembly Materials I. 24 to 16 Assembly Materials III.
NISKA SKYCALLER.update_1.53: Max range increased from 225m to 275m. Accuracy at max range decreased by ~7% (35m to 37.5m). Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Niska-Rycker MK. IX Skycaller: 1 inventory slot > 4C-Fire Rocket x1 ammo slot.

O'BRIEN V.110.name: Ammo
O'BRIEN V.110.“: Warden Armoured Cars are quick, well-rounded urban assault platforms. These anti-infantry vehicles are equipped with twin-barrelled machineguns.
O'BRIEN V.110.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
O'BRIEN V.110.update_1.59:_infantry_update: Mechanic Change(s) All vehicle gunners are now impacted by stability similar to infantry. Rotating the turret or moving the vehicle with reduce the accuracy of the gun. Enclosed gunners can be suppressed by 20mm. Vehicle cannons that fire multiple shots will have a stability cost per shot, similar to infantry weapons. Balance Change(s) All Armoured Cars have had their health increased slightly.
O'BRIEN V.110.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
O'BRIEN V.110.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 75 to 50 Processed Construction Materials.
O'BRIEN V.110.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. O'Brien V.110: 1 inventory slot > 7.92mm x30 ammo slot.

OUTLAW.name: Ammo
OUTLAW.“: Originally designed in response to increasing swarms of Mesean armour, the Outlaw is an exceptionally capable medium tank armed with a long-range 40mm turret and includes a built-in storm rifle support position.
OUTLAW.small_assembly_station_[tank_factory]: 1 x Gallagher Brigand Mk. I 10 x Processed Construction Materials 10 x Assembly Materials I 10 x Assembly Materials IV 2MW of Power
OUTLAW.update_1.59: Now a variant of the newly-introduced Gallagher Brigand Mk. I. Wiki Note: Previously the base vehicle, and was produced at a Garage. Cost: 150 Refined Materials > 10x Processed Construction Materials, 10x Assembly Materials I, and 10x Assembly Materials IV. Balance Change(s) Reload speed decreased from 5.5 to 5s. Added a high velocity modifier of 20%.
OUTLAW.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
OUTLAW.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 450 to 300 Processed Construction Materials.
OUTLAW.update_1.55: Health increased from 2700 to 2950. Armour Health increased by 10%. Wiki Note: Increased from 10000 to 11000. Refined Material cost reduced from 165 to 150. Tier upgrade cost decreased from 465 to 450 Processed Construction Materials.
OUTLAW.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Gallagher Outlaw Mk. II: 2 inventory slots > 7.92mm x40 ammo slot, 40mm x40 ammo slot.

RAMPART.name: Ammo
RAMPART.“: The Rampart is a powerful field cannon capable of dealing devastating damage to all but the heaviest of armoured vehicles while providing its crew with comprehensive ballistic shielding.
RAMPART.small_assembly_station_[field_station]: 1 x Collins Cannon 68mm 5 x Processed Construction Materials 5 x Assembly Materials IV 2MW of Power
RAMPART.update_1.59:_infantry_update: General Change(s) Hidden Field Weapons are briefly revealed if they fire their weapon*. Players enclosed in a vehicle will not see them be revealed.
RAMPART.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 75 to 50 Processed Construction Materials. 15 to 10 Assembly Materials IV.

SPITFIRE.name: Ammo
SPITFIRE.“: This small tank has been recently recommissioned to the Warden arsenal. It boasts high maneuverability and an antenna that allows for long-range communications during high-stakes recon operations.
SPITFIRE.update_1.64: Armour health increased from 6000 to 8000. Track disable chance increased from 20 to 25%. Stability cost per shot reduced. Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate. General Change(s) Scout Tank repair cost reduced from 135 to 100.
SPITFIRE.update_1.59:_infantry_update: Turret turning speed has been increased by 20%.
SPITFIRE.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
SPITFIRE.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 210 to 140 Processed Construction Materials.
SPITFIRE.update_1.54_naval_warfare: Can now be shipped in Flatbeds and Landing Ships.
SPITFIRE.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. King Spire MK-I: 2 inventory slots > 12.7mm x30 ammo slot, 1 inventory slot.
SPITFIRE.update_1.50_inferno: Scout Tanks size reduced so they are not as big as the Light Tanks after they were resized in Update 0.49.
SPITFIRE.update_0.48: Stability when firing has been improved.
SPITFIRE.update_0.44: Commander position now serve double duty as gunner.

STARBREAKER.name: Ammo
STARBREAKER.“: Built to compliment other free-standing artillery pieces, the emplaced  Huber Starbreaker launches 94.5mm shells over very long distances. A  necessary tool for infantry to knock back armoured Colonial advances.
STARBREAKER.small_assembly_station_[tank_factory]: 135 x Processed Construction Materials 10 x Assembly Materials I 15 x Assembly Materials IV 2MW of Power
STARBREAKER.update_1.59:_infantry_update: General Change(s) Hidden Emplacements are briefly revealed if they fire their weapon*. Players enclosed in a vehicle will not see them be revealed.
STARBREAKER.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Huber Starbreaker 94.5mm: 1 inventory slot > 94.5mm x1 ammo slot.

STOCKADE.name: Ammo
STOCKADE.“: This robust field cannon not only allows infantry to fire heavy 75mm shells with ease, but it provides state-of-the-art curved blast shielding for maximum protection from crossfire.
STOCKADE.small_assembly_station_[weapons_platform: 1 x Balfour Wolfhound 40mm 15 x Steel Construction Materials 20 x Assembly Materials II 15 x Assembly Materials III 2MW of Power
STOCKADE.update_1.64: Horizontal firing arc increased by 5 degrees to either side.
STOCKADE.update_1.59:_infantry_update: General Change(s) Hidden Field Weapons are briefly revealed if they fire their weapon*. Players enclosed in a vehicle will not see them be revealed.
STOCKADE.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 55 to 36 Steel Construction Materials. 60 to 40 Assembly Materials II. 45 to 30 Assembly Materials III.
STOCKADE.update_1.55: Added a High Velocity modifier of 35%.
STOCKADE.update_1.54_naval_warfare: Added effective range and ineffective range to the Balfour Stockade 75mm and 945g "Stygian Bolt". Effective range is the range that a weapon fires with full accuracy. Ineffective range is additional range weapons can fire to without full accuracy. Effective range increased from 35m to 37.5m. Added 5m of ineffective range at 42.5m. Mechanic Change(s) The 120-68 "Koronides" Field Gun, 945g “Stygian Bolt”, Rycker 4/3-F Wasp Nest, and the Balfour Stockade 75mm are now classed as Large Field Weapons (meaning those now need to be deployed in order to fire). Wiki Note: The model was changed, transforming it into a Field Weapon that must be deployed in order to fire.
STOCKADE.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Balfour Stockade 75mm: 1 inventory slot > 75mm x1 ammo slot.

SWALLOWTAIL.name: Ammo
SWALLOWTAIL.“: A dual barrelled, high calibre anti-infantry machine gun. The Swallowtail is fitted with forward-facing armour plating and is excellent for suppression.
SWALLOWTAIL.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
SWALLOWTAIL.update_1.59:_infantry_update: General Change(s) Hidden Field Weapons are briefly revealed if they fire their weapon*. Players enclosed in a vehicle will not see them be revealed.
SWALLOWTAIL.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 60 to 40 Processed Construction Materials.
SWALLOWTAIL.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Swallowtail 988/145-2: 1 inventory slot > 12.7mm x30 ammo slot.

THORNFALL.name: Ammo
THORNFALL.“: Armed with a rack of Bonesaw mortar launchers, the Thornfall is designed to launch an indirect mechanized assault on enemy armour. This unique vehicle supports an allied assault and cannot withstand large amounts of punishment.
THORNFALL.small_assembly_station_[weapons_platform: 1 x Gallagher Brigand Mk. I 60 x Processed Construction Materials 10 x Assembly Materials I 15 x Assembly Materials III 15 x Assembly Materials IV 2MW of Power
THORNFALL.update_1.61: Processed Construction Materials cost increased from 45 to 60.
THORNFALL.update_1.59:_infantry_update: Firing duration decreased to 0.8s, allowing for rapid fire. Cost reduced from 10 Steel Construction Materials to 45 Processed Construction Materials and 15 Assembly Materials III. General Change(s) Base Chassis changed from: Gallagher Outlaw Mk. II > Gallagher Brigand Mk. I.
THORNFALL.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
THORNFALL.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 110 to 72 Steel Construction Materials. 30 to 20 Assembly Materials I. 45 to 30 Assembly Materials IV.
THORNFALL.update_1.55: Health increased from 2400 to 2650. Armour Health increased by 10%. Wiki Note: Increased from 10000 to 11000.
THORNFALL.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Gallagher Thornfall MK. VI: 2 inventory slots > 7.92mm x40 ammo slot, ARC/RPG x24 ammo slot.

WASP.name: Ammo
WASP.“: Lyle Rycker first built a prototype of the Wasp Nest as a test for his rack mounted rocket batteries that would eventually find their way onto armoured vehicles. Capable of firing twelve compact rockets in quick succession, the Wasp Nest became a quick favourite of the Warden infantry testing it, so an official design was requisitioned.
WASP.small_assembly_station_[battery_line]: 20 x Processed Construction Materials 15 x Assembly Materials II 3 x Assembly Materials IV 2MW of Power
WASP.update_1.61: Min range increased to 350m. Max range increased to 450m. Wiki Note: Previously had a range of 225m - 325m. The accuracy of each platform has been adjusted accordingly. Wiki Note: Dispersion radius at min/max range increased from 25m/32.5m to 37.5m/60m.
WASP.update_1.59:_infantry_update: General Change(s) Hidden Field Weapons are briefly revealed if they fire their weapon*. Players enclosed in a vehicle will not see them be revealed.
WASP.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased by the following. 60 to 40 Processed Construction Materials. 45 to 30 Assembly Materials II. 9 to 6 Assembly Materials IV.
WASP.update_1.54_naval_warfare: Range increased from 300m to 325m. Accuracy firing at max range increased by ~14% (37.5m to 32.5m dispersion). The 120-68 "Koronides" Field Gun, 945g “Stygian Bolt”, Rycker 4/3-F Wasp Nest, and the Balfour Stockade 75mm are now classed as Large Field Weapons (meaning those now need to be deployed in order to fire).
WASP.update_1.53: Max range increased from 225m to 300m. Min range increased from 200m to 225m. Accuracy at max range decreased by ~7% (from 35m to 37.5m). Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Rycker 4/3-F Wasp Nest: 1 inventory slot > 4C-Fire Rocket x1 ammo slot.

WIDOW.name: Ammo
WIDOW.“: This deadly tank turns predator into prey. A tank Destroyer, the Noble Widow specializes in ambush tactics, waiting for its quarry and striking with destructive high-velocity shells.
WIDOW.update_1.64: Chassis Change: Penetration chance increased from 17 to 22%. Off-road and reverse speed penalty removed. Fuel consumption reduced by 30%. Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
WIDOW.update_1.58: General Change(s) Refuelling a vehicle now checks all nearby liquid sources for valid liquids, not just the closest source.
WIDOW.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 480 to 320 Processed Construction Materials.
WIDOW.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Noble Widow MK. XIV: 1 inventory slot > 68mm x50 ammo slot.

WOLFHOUND.name: Ammo
WOLFHOUND.“: This destructive short-ranged cannon is designed for direct engagement with enemy fortifications. The Wolfhound is fitted with reinforced shielding and a 40mm barrel.
WOLFHOUND.update_1.64: Logi Change(s) Vehicles and structures that can be made at the Mass Production Factory can now be re-crated whilst in a stockpile via the context menu (RMB click). Wiki Note: Requires 3 (or 5) of the amount, and assembles the "Shippable Crate." It is deposited on the nearby pad, akin to a regular Shippable Crate.
WOLFHOUND.update_1.59:_infantry_update: General Change(s) Hidden Field Weapons are briefly revealed if they fire their weapon*. Players enclosed in a vehicle will not see them be revealed.
WOLFHOUND.update_1.56: General Change(s) The upgrade cost of most vehicles at the Field Modification Center has been reduced by ~33%. Wiki Note: The upgrade cost decreased from 60 to 40 Processed Construction Materials.
WOLFHOUND.update_1.53: Vehicles with weapons, Emplacements and Tripod Weapons now have a Dedicated Ammo Slot which limits the amount of ammo they can store. Balfour Wolfhound 40mm: 1 inventory slot > 40mm x40 ammo slot.
